mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NATIONAL_HOLIDAYS ( HLD_ID, HLD_DATE, HLD_NAME, IS_REST, COUNTRY ) VALUES ( SEQ_HLD_ID.NEXTVAL, TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{title}, 'Y', 'KR' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NATIONAL_HOLIDAYS WHERE TO_CHAR(HLD_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{hldDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENTS ( EVENT_ID, PROJ_ID, TITLE, START_DT, END_DT, IS_PRIVATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_EVENT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{projId}, #{title}, TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.USER_NAME FROM EVENTS e JOIN USERS u ON e.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE e.PROJ_ID = #{projId} AND (e.IS_PRIVATE = 'N' OR e.USER_ID = #{userId})
